reasoning: FIDE standard chess ratings are published once a month, strictly on the first of each month. The Wikipedia page 'FIDE rankings' mirrors these official monthly lists and is updated accordingly. The text of the article currently states 'The top 20 female players were ranked on 1 March 2026 as follows'. Since there are no official monthly FIDE classical rating updates between March 15 and March 22, the Elo ratings on the Wikipedia page will remain identical on both dates. Furthermore, even if there were an exception or retroactive correction, a 1% increase for a player at 2535 Elo translates to over 25 points, which is a massive fluctuation to occur unexpectedly mid-month. The probability of such a change is effectively zero (bounded to 0.05 following system limits).
